suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that baseline validator commands can be expected to fail before initial scaffold creation when package/tooling files do not yet exist; treat this as a permitted pre-scaffold condition rather than a procedural failure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-shell-astro-scaffold review observed ENOENT on `npm run astro check` before scaffolding; worker handoff explicitly recorded the baseline-validation deviation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit agent-browser readiness preflight guidance (including install/check step) before required browser automation steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-shell-astro-scaffold review identified early agent-browser failures/timeouts before install, indicating a repeatable setup ambiguity in current skill instructions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add Windows-native fallbacks for init script execution and long-lived dev-server startup commands.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: portfolio-resume-pages-content review references handoff deviations for environment initialization and service startup caused by missing Windows-specific fallback guidance.
